description: Calculates energy consumed per trip from battery range delta and a per-vehicle efficiency factor derived statistically from charging history and updated after each qualifying session.

actors.name: System
actors.description: Calculates and stores energy metrics when trips and charging sessions close

actors.name: Vehicle Owner
actors.description: May configure preferred range metric (ideal vs rated)

energy_from_range_and_efficiency.description: Energy consumed per trip is estimated as range_delta_km x efficiency_wh_per_km divided by 1000

preferred_range_configurable.description: Range delta uses the configured preferred_range_metric (ideal or rated); changing this setting affects all future efficiency derivations

efficiency_from_charging_history.description: The efficiency factor is a per-vehicle value derived from the statistical mode of kWh-per-range-gained across qualifying charging sessions — not a fixed manufacturer specification

charging_session_qualifies.description: A session qualifies for efficiency derivation only when duration > 10 minutes, end_battery_level <= 95%, both start and end range values are present, and charge_energy_added > 0

precision_fallback_strategy.description: Derivation tries decreasing decimal precision (5 to 2) paired with decreasing minimum sample counts (8, 5, 3, 2) and accepts the first precision level with a consensus

retain_existing_if_no_consensus.description: If no precision level yields a consensus the existing efficiency factor is retained unchanged and never deleted or set to null

no_negative_energy.description: Negative range_delta (battery charged during trip via regeneration artifact) is treated as zero energy consumed

energy_estimated_at_trip_close.result: Energy estimate attached to the completed trip record

given: a qualifying charging session has just completed
at least 2 sessions meet the derivation criteria at some precision level

then.value: mode of charge_energy_added per range_added across qualifying sessions

efficiency_updated_after_charge.result: Vehicle efficiency factor updated; future trip energy estimates improve

given: a charging session has just completed
no consensus found across all precision and threshold levels
efficiency_unchanged_insufficient_data.result: Efficiency factor unchanged; previous value used for future estimates

events.name: trip.energy.calculated
events.description: Energy consumption estimate attached to a completed trip

events.name: vehicle.efficiency.updated
events.description: Vehicle efficiency factor recalculated from charging history

events.name: vehicle.efficiency.unchanged
events.description: Efficiency derivation ran but found no consensus; value kept

errors.message: Not enough qualifying charging sessions to derive an efficiency factor.

goals.description: Calculates energy consumed per trip from battery range delta and a per-vehicle efficiency factor derived statistically from charging history and updated after each qualifying session.

success_metrics.measurement: Successful operations divided by total attempts
Failed operations divided by total attempts

tradeoffs.reason: asset tracking must maintain precise location and status records
